content.en:
It's so remote here, it's impossible for the Lord of the Legendary Realm to come here for no reason.

The Star Lord was very cautious, and fled directly into the empty sea to prepare to leave.

However.

Rumble!!!!

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords made a move and attacked him directly.

"It's you!"

When the Tricky Star Lord saw Ye Tian, Dragon Gu Lord and other Legendary Realm Lords, he was extremely angry, and at the same time, he was extremely puzzled

He was hiding here, how did Ye Tian and the other Legendary Realm Lords find him?

Could it be that the Holy Land really paid a big price to ask a peak legend realm lord to find him, but the peak legend realm lord almost has his own arrogance and principles, and rarely does this kind of thing~.

After all, for the pinnacle Legendary Realm Lord, the ordinary Legendary Realm Lord is an ant.

A swarm of ants came to him to investigate another ant, which the Peak Legends Realm Lord generally disdained to do.

At this moment, the Star Lord didn't think much about it, he would fall now if he wasn't careful, where would he still have the heart to think about this

His two doppelgangers also took action, fighting for the hope of the main body to escape.

At this time, Ye Hao stared directly at the body of the Star Lord.

"Void River Sword Light!"

Ye Tian held the Zixu Sword in his hand and slashed it with a sword.

In an instant, the Trick Star Lord forcibly withstood Ye Tianyi's sword.

Rumble!!!!

The body of the Star Lord was directly pierced, and this sword directly hit it from one end of Kukai to the other

Moreover, the Star Lord was injured, and his injuries were not light.

"Endless Lord!!

The Star Lord was dumbfounded.

Ye Tian, the Endless Lord who had only been a half-step Legendary Realm Lord before, and would be injured if he received a blow from him, now had no sword to hurt him, and the injury was not light.

Obviously, the strength of the Endless Lord Ye Tian had reached the true top level of an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord, and he was much stronger than him.

Moreover, this supreme skill that had just been used was many times more powerful than the original supreme skill.

This must be a supreme technique created by Ye Tian again, containing time and the way of the sword.

In other words, in addition to controlling time, Ye Tian also controlled the way of the sword.

"Demon, real demon, I should have listened to the words of the border lord in the first place, and I shouldn't have provoked the endless lord!

The Star Lord regretted it, but it was useless to regret it.

War!

The Tricky Star Lord did not hesitate at all, and fought with Ye Tian and the others.

And Ye Tian alone has mastered five supreme skills

Time escapes time dripping, time domain boundary, time barrier, void river sword light.

On the search for the Yin, Ye Tian has the supreme legend body

Suffice it to say, he has few flaws.

Bang!!!

The Star Lord was directly crushed.

Tricky Star Arrow!

The Star Lord used his own Median Eternal Treasure to lock on to Ye Tian.

The Star Arrow is difficult to dodge and can only be defended

Ye Tian's time escape had no way to completely dodge the Trick Star Arrow, so Ye Tian chose to resist hard.

Time barrier, plus Median Eternal Arcana protection, plus Supreme Legendary Body.

Although the Star Arrow broke through the time barrier, it was blocked by the Supreme Legendary Body and the Median Eternal Arcana.

Ye Tian was only repelled physically, but he was not injured.

"The Star Arrow didn't hurt it!"

The Trickster Star Lord was extremely disappointed, he struck with all his might, but he couldn't hurt Ye Tian.

Soon, the Star Lord was seriously injured.

At this time, he went crazy and sacrificed two clones to create an opportunity for the main body to escape.

However.

The clone has fallen, but the Star Lord still hasn't gotten rid of Ye Tian and them.

"I know the border lord, I am his apprentice grandson, which of you dares to kill me?"

The Star Lord shouted.

He couldn't care about it anymore, although the border lord wouldn't let him say it, but now that he was going to die, what else was he afraid of?

Lord Longgu said, "If the Border Lord saves you again, we can't kill you." "

However, the Frontier Lord never made a move.

"Void River Sword Light!"

Ye Tian's sword struck again.

The Star Lord was shattered and completely killed by the time and space he was in.

Somewhere in the Void Zone.

The Frontier Lord sensed the fall of the Star Lord, but shook his head: "Don't provoke the Endless Lord, you want to go!"

He didn't save because he didn't want to get involved

Although Endless Lord Ye Tian was in his eyes, he was now just an ant, and he could easily kill him.

However, he won't make a move, he can't see through Ye Tian, this is not normal, in case there is an eternal controller behind Ye Tian, if he makes a move, he will die directly in that instant.

He didn't want to die, so he wouldn't save the Star Lord again.

Anyway, he has no relationship with the Star Lord, and there is no causal entanglement.

Immediately, he withdrew his gaze and continued fishing

......

"Finally killed the Star Lord!"

Lord Longgu said with a sigh of relief.

The Star Lord is immortal, they are all worried in their hearts, but now they don't have to worry.

"This time, the border lord didn't make a move, I'm afraid that the last time it was just to end the cause and effect. Lord Wasteland said.

....... コ0，

Lord Longgu nodded: "It must be so, the Lord of the Trick Star and the Lord of the Frontier have no intersection at all, except for the end of the cause and effect, I can't think of any other possibility." "

"Cause and effect are over, the border lord and the star lord have nothing to do with each other, and it is unlikely that they will interfere. "

"Hahaha, if the Lord of the Trick Star had a deep relationship with the Border Lord, he would not be hiding here, and if he appeared openly and openly in the name of the Border Lord, we would not dare to kill him. But he went into hiding, and the meaning was already obvious. "

"This Star Lord's Star Arrow is good.Endless Lord, take it. "

Ye Tian shook his head and refused, "Everyone, this Tricky Star Arrow is not suitable for me, I don't want it, leave it to the True No Holy Land." "

"That's good, put it in the treasure house of the True Sacred Land, if anyone wants it, apply for an exchange. "

The True Spirit Lord suggested.

Soon, they left the place and returned to the True Void Holy Land.

Not long after, the news of the fall of the Star Lord came out, and the Infinite Sea was shocked.

After all, many Legendary Realm Lords knew that the Trick Star Lord was hiding, and he should be hiding in the Void River Boundary Array, but in this case, the Trick Star Lord was found and killed.

This is enough to prove the heritage and strength of the True No Holy Land.

In the future, if they offend the True Void Holy Land, I am afraid that it will be useless to hide in the Void River Boundary Array.

Time passed slowly, and before I knew it, hundreds of thousands of eternal years had passed, and the fall of the Star Lord had gradually subsided. _
